name: Fiesta Chili Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8.5 oz. ea.) corn muffin mix
1 can (11 oz.) Mexican style corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Spray 2 Flan Pans with vegetable oil spray.
3. Combine corn muffin mix, eggs, milk and corn in a Batter Bowl.
4. Divide batter into half and pour into each Flan Pan.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
6. Let cool for 10 minutes and turn tarts out onto serving trays.
7. In a 1 1/2 quart Saucepan, heat chili over medium heat.
8. Divide chili into half and spread evenly in the well of each flan tart.
9. Layer cheeses, green onions and olives over chili.
10. Garnish with sour cream if desired. Yield: 12 servings or 24 sample servings.
